name: chart-tooltip-advanced
visual_summary: A chart tooltip with advanced features for displaying detailed information about data points in a chart. This component is useful when a user requires more context about a specific data point in a chart. Developers should use this component when they need to provide additional insights to users.
style_tags: dark mode is supported but not the primary style
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready tooltip component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-tooltip-advanced
Description: A chart tooltip with advanced features for displaying detailed information about data points in a chart. This component is useful when a user requires more context about a specific data point in a chart. Developers should use this component when they need to provide additional insights to users.
Style: e.g. minimalist, dark mode is supported but not the primary style, clean
Interactions: cursor hover for tooltip reveal, not animated, clickable to expand content
Tags: chart, tooltip, advanced

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
